mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration_record r WHERE r.collection_id = t.id) as totalFillCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration_record r WHERE r.collection_id = t.id AND DATE(r.submit_time) = CURDATE()) as todayFillCount
, (SELECT MIN(r2.submit_time) FROM registration_record r2 WHERE r2.collection_id = t.id AND r2.share_user_id = #{userId}) as firstShareDate
FROM collection_info t WHERE t.del_flag = 'N'
AND t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND t.enterprise_code = #{enterpriseCode}
AND (FIND_IN_SET(#{userId}, t.sharable_staff_ids) OR t.creator_id = #{userId})
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
